mapper.sql: id , user_id, ticket_id, ticket_num, price, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_order (id, user_id, ticket_id, ticket_num, price, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ticketId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{ticketNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_order
id,
user_id,
ticket_id,
ticket_num,
price,
status,
create_time,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{ticketId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{ticketNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_order
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ticket_id = #{ticketId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ticket_num = #{ticketNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_order set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ticket_id = #{ticketId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ticket_num = #{ticketNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select count(id) from t_order where status = #{status}
